packetloss404/packetade.description: PacketCode wraps Claude Code, Codex, Gemini, and OpenCode into a native multi-pane workspace with agent profiles, GitHub integration, and persistent memory — so your AI sessions get smarter over time.

packetloss404/packetcode.description: A keyboard-first, multi-provider AI coding agent for the terminal. Lives in your terminal and talks to five LLM providers behind a single unified interface. It can read, edit, patch, search, and execute against your project
